name: zig-dom
description: Bun-only Zig-backed DOM implementation with happy-dom-compatible surface

scripts.build: bun run build:native && bun run build:js
scripts.verify:ffi: bun run build:native && bun test tests/unit/ffi.test.ts
scripts.verify:dom: bun run build && bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom
scripts.verify:react: bun run build && bun run scripts/smoke-bun-react.ts
scripts.verify:fast: bun run verify:ffi && bun run verify:dom && bun run verify:react
scripts.test: bun run build && bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom tests/integration/react
scripts.test:react: bun run build && bun test tests/integration/react
